prompts.name: review_skill_description
prompts.description: Analyze a skill description for trigger quality and suggest improvements.

params.name: skill_name
params.description: Name of the skill to review

prompts.template:
Review this skill description for trigger quality.

Skill: {skill_name}
Description: {description}

Evaluate on:
1. Specificity — does it name concrete triggers?
2. Coverage — does it catch adjacent use cases?
3. Exclusions — are boundaries clear?
4. Pushiness — will it trigger when it should?

Provide a score (1-5) for each dimension and suggest an improved version.

prompts.name: generate_tool_declaration
prompts.description: Generate an mcp_tools.json entry from a Python script's argparse interface.

params.name: script_path
params.description: Path to the Python tool script
